title: vulvaria botrys
intro: Vulvaria botrys, also known as the common wax cap, is a type of edible mushroom belonging to the family Hygrophoraceae. This fungus is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Vulvaria botrys include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antitumor activity. In herbal preparations, the mushroom is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
